titles.title: God Is the Strength – My Life Is in You Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Whom have I in heaven but You There is nothing on earth I desire beside You My heart and my strength many times they fail But there is one truth that always will prevail

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is the strength of my heart God is the strength of my heart God is the strength of my heart And my portion forever, forever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My life is in You, Lord My strength is in You, Lord My hope is in You, Lord In You, it’s in You.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will praise You with all of my life I will praise You with all of my strength With all of my life With all of my strength All of my hope is in You
